text.title: Focus Groups Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Focus Groups to a concrete case.

section.title: Early-career PM career-growth research

example.code:
Segment: early-career-pm. 3 groups × 7-9 participants × 70-80 min.
Discussion guide: warm-up 10 min → 3 topics with probe ladders (40 min) → concept reveal last 20 min → wrap-up.
Themes: - career growth metric ambiguity (3/3 groups): 'I never know if my OKRs count or my output counts' - mentorship gap (2/3 groups): 'My manager is also early-career' - promotion criteria opacity (3/3 groups): 'I can't see the bar from here'
Design implication: explicit career-growth rubric exposed in product.

section.note: All themes supported by ≥2 groups; theme grounded in verbatim quotes.
